summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Learning & Development professional who thrives on developing training grounded in evidence, solving problems through data analysis, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve how people learn and grow—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

experience.title: Program Enablement Manager

Develop guides, workflows, and training content for 70+ staff, cutting onboarding time by 75%
Conduct needs assessments with 25+ stakeholders to find learning gaps and design 3 new programs
Manage 20+ programs and 10+ vendors, refining delivery strategy via structured feedback analysis

Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training

Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management

Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized campus recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite executives at top universities to attract talent
